probes.name: athlete-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: athletes, athlete_medical_history + their indexes.

probes.name: athlete-medical-history-table-present
probes.description: Confirms the dedicated athlete_medical_history table exists (separate from the normal audits table). Missing this means every medical write silently lands in the normal audits table + loses the 7-year regulated-health retention guarantee.

probes.name: athlete-medical-queue-connected
probes.description: Confirms the medical-audit queue (default Redis) is reachable. Falls back to sync dispatch when unreachable — but the health probe surfaces the degraded state.

probes.name: athlete-age-group-snapshot-currency
probes.description: Detects athletes whose current_age_group_snapshot_at is older than 48 hours (the config threshold). Fires a WARN when > 100 stale athletes exist — indicates RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob has stalled.

probes.name: athlete-consent-expiry-backlog
probes.description: Detects athletes whose consent_recorded_at is > 365 days old (when athlete_consent_workflow entitlement is on) without any refresh. Fires a WARN when > 20 such athletes exist per tenant — indicates guardian outreach failure.

probes.name: athlete-orphan-athlete-detection
probes.description: Detects Athlete rows with status='active' referencing a Branch with status != 'active' (would violate the PreventAthleteOrphansOnBranchArchived hook if retroactively applied — indicates historical drift).

probes.name: athlete-minor-name-leakage-detection
probes.description: Random-samples 100 platform-admin GET responses over the last hour + checks the redactor stripped minor names correctly. Any leakage is a P1 compliance incident.

probes.name: athlete-medical-history-write-latency
probes.description: P99 write latency on athlete_medical_history. Should be < 100ms — small table with append-only writes; latency drift indicates disk pressure or lock contention.

probes.name: athlete-slot-headroom
probes.description: Counts tenants within 10% of their athlete_slot cap. Product signal — the sales team may want to reach out for a tier upgrade.
